ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the hospital */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the hospital's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the hospital's website */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the department is located */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department's responsibilities and services */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the department */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "shift_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift (e.g., 8 D, 12 E) */,
  "shift_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the shift (e.g., 8 hours, 12 hours) */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., Day, Evening, Night) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "required_staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff required for the shift */,
  "shift_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or requirements for the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_durations" (
  "job_duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job duration */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the job (e.g., 13 Weeks, 6 Weeks) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the job duration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job duration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job duration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job duration (e.g., Open, Filled, Cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the job duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_durations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital located at this address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "nearby_neighborhoods" TEXT /* Nearby neighborhoods of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "nearest_public_transport" TEXT /* Nearest public transport options */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the neighborhood */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Nearby amenities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, admin, manager) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the user was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, On Leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shift_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the shift */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift being assigned */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the shift is assigned */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the shift assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the shift assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shift assignment (e.g., Confirmed, Tentative, Cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shift assignment */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the shift assignment */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the shift assignment was approved */,
  "shift_swap_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift swap request (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_assignments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_assignments_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_assignments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
